# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Workflow Routine Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection Detection
